info.description: The /the-work/quiz page. Hero copy + 6 result blurbs are editable here. The 5 questions and scoring weights stay in code (technical content that doesn't change often).

eyebrow.default: What do you need right now?

intro.default: Five short questions. No personal data, no email required. At the end you get one recommendation tuned to where you actually are right now.

results.description: Six result blurbs (one per recommendation slug). Don't add or remove entries — the 6 slugs match the quiz scoring logic. Title, blurb, and CTA ARE editable.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
